nodes.definition: A verbal argument.

To sully with mud or dung.
A chronological mistake; the erroneous dating of an event, circumstance, or object.
for the sake of argument; assuming without deciding; identifying the premises of a hypothetical argument while making it clear that no finding is being made on whether the premises are true.
To con, defraud, trick, to make a fool of, to humbug or impose on someone.
Of or relating to biology.
Of, pertaining to, or resembling a hedgehog.

With a crook or bend; with the hand on the hip and elbow turned outward.

An ill-tempered person full of stubborn ideas or opinions, often an older man.
Showing difference; inconsistent, dissimilar.

Talkative; chatty.

To enlarge; to make or become bigger.

Subject to discussion (originally at a moot); arguable, debatable, unsolved or impossible to solve.
